'''Oosk Kassa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] who worked for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for killing several of his servants.

==Behind the scenes==
Oosk Kassa's bounty is 6,000 credits alive and 3,000 credits dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
